name: timelines-chart

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need grouped/entity swimlanes for discrete or continuous state intervals, a color legend, and brush zooming instead of hand-written SVG, which fails at interval hit-testing, time axes across scales, vertical lane layout, and synchronized zoom. Do not use it for a dependency-aware project Gantt or a list of point events.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce state-band swimlanes for service availability, device status, or staffing schedules: interval layout, brush zooming, color scales, and hit-testing across many rows are all weak areas. This component expresses the entire view through a fixed three-level array.

data_in.note: The exact native shape is Group[]: group.data[] contains swimlanes, and each swimlane's data[] contains time intervals. timeRange accepts Date or epoch-milliseconds; upstream new Date also converts ISO strings passed through JSON. Use either categorical strings or continuous numbers for val consistently across the dataset.

data.timeRange: [Date | ISO-8601 string | epoch-milliseconds, Date | ISO-8601 string | epoch-milliseconds] -- [start,end]
data.val: string | number -- use string when qualitative=true, otherwise number
data.labelVal?: string | number -- value displayed at left/in the tooltip; defaults to val

options?.qualitative?: boolean -- categorical color-scale mode; defaults to false (continuous numeric color scale)
options?.use_utc?: boolean -- defaults to false (local time zone)
options?.enable_overview?: boolean -- bottom overview brush; defaults to true

spec.note: Swimlane row layout and brushing require an explicit pixel height. Default maxHeight is 480px and AI may override it. Set height:480px before container initialization; vh and percentage heights are forbidden by iron rule 3.

when_to_use: 需要按组/实体展示离散或连续状态区间、颜色图例并用 brush 缩放的泳道图时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在区间命中、跨尺度时间轴、纵向泳道布局与缩放同步上失败;非做项目依赖甘特或单点事件列表。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到服务可用性、设备状态或值班表这类状态带泳道:时间段布局、brush 缩放、颜色尺度与大量行的命中检测均为零能力区;本组件用固定三层数组一次表达。

data_in.note: 原生精确形状是 Group[]:group.data[] 是泳道,每条泳道的 data[] 才是时间段;timeRange 接 Date 或 epoch-milliseconds,JSON 传 ISO 字符串也会被上游 new Date 转换。val 全局统一用类别字符串或连续数值。

data.timeRange: [Date | ISO-8601 string | epoch-milliseconds, Date | ISO-8601 string | epoch-milliseconds] —— [start,end]
data.val: string | number —— qualitative=true 时用 string,否则用 number
data.labelVal?: string | number —— 左侧/提示显示值,默认等于 val

options?.qualitative?: boolean —— 类别色标模式,默认 false(连续数值色标)
options?.use_utc?: boolean —— 默认 false(本地时区)
options?.enable_overview?: boolean —— 底部 overview brush,默认 true

spec.note: 泳道图的行布局与 brush 需要明确像素高度;默认 maxHeight 480px,AI 可覆盖。容器初始化前设 height:480px,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

boot.widget: unsupported: timelines-chart@2.14.3 的 ESM 在 import 时硬写 document.head,且发布包无独立 CSS 文件可放入 shadowRoot;违反铁律 2,不得伪装成 shadow-safe。

example._why: 时间轴的三层 group/label/segment 嵌套与 qualitative/continuous 分支高歧义,minimal example 用真实原生形状消歧。

uplink: display/local-explore 类,默认无需上行。若需回传泳道或区间点击,由消费 AI 接原生 onLabelClick/onSegmentClick 并按载体处理;不建立统一事件协议。

carriers.widget: unsupported:ESM 硬注入 document.head 且无独立 CSS 资产,shadowRoot 内样式不可得,违反铁律 2
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG/DOM + pointer brush,无 worker/wasm 或默认上行依赖

isolation.evidence: mjs 含 styleInject(css){...var head=document.head...} 把内置 CSS(含 .chart-tooltip 规则)注入 document.head(styleInject×2, document.head×1),且发布包无独立 .css 资产可改道 shadowRoot→shadowCompatible=no、widget unsupported 成立、globalStyleInjection=yes。document.body=0 且 window/document.addEventListener=0:tooltip 为 .chart-tooltip 元素落图表自有容器,brush/zoom 用 d3 事件绑定于自有 SVG,无 body 追加/全局窗口监听→globalDomMutation=no、globalEvents=no。
